heroStory.title: Ireland vs Czechia: Everything You Need to Watch Thursday's World Cup Play-Off From Abroad
heroStory.title_ga: Éire i gcoinne na Seicia: Gach Rud a Chaithfidh Tú Bheith ar Eolas Agat chun Cluiche Dé Déardaoin a Fheiceáil ón gCoigríoch
heroStory.summary: Ireland face Czechia in Prague on Thursday in a World Cup 2026 play-off semi-final. Here's when to watch, how to stream, and what's at stake for the diaspora.
heroStory.summary_ga: Tá Éire ag imirt i gcoinne na Seicia i bPrág Dé Déardaoin i leathchluiche ceannais cháilithe Chorn an Domhain 2026. Seo cathain le féachaint, conas é a shruthú, agus cad atá i gceist don diaspóra.
heroStory.author: Irish Ledger Staff
